title: task
description: simulation.py:174 - calculate_tx_jitter() calls randint(jitter_min_us, jitter_max_us) without validating min <= max. If user passes jitter_min_us=5, jitter_max_us=3, random.randint raises ValueError: empty range for randrange(). Failure: Server crash on first TX with invalid jitter config.
close_reason: Fixed: Added validation in Simulation.__init__ to raise ValueError when jitter_min_us > jitter_max_us (only when jitter is enabled)
